data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. PAW MANNY settled down midfield and held his position to the line when finishing 4th (26.61) at Warragul. Tough to beat if on-song. 6. RED HOT PRETTY turned in a solid run last start over 350m at Healesville finishing 5th and beaten only 5 lengths (19.75). Cannot be taken lightly. 4. AUNTIE AMBER was responsible for a modest effort most recently when fifth at this track over 450m behind Paw Harry (26.40) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can measure up. 3. MIA BLONDE can play a role in the finish without surprising.","runners":[2,6,4,3],"exclusive":false}
